attributes.content:
## Overview

The Questionnaire card gives the workspace a structured home for structured questionnaire with typed questions (text, choice, scale) and validation.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Questionnaire turns raw activity into structured measurement. The card needs to stay queryable, filterable, and composable so that summaries, dashboards, and automations can build on top of it instead of recreating calculations downstream.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Report]]** -- Questionnaire can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Metrics (KPI)]]** -- Metrics (KPI) can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Questionnaire.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Questionnaire can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Questionnaire can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Questionnaire.
- **[[Project]]** -- Questionnaire can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Survey]]** -- Survey can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Questionnaire.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Questionnaire as the structured home for structured questionnaire with typed questions (text, choice, scale) and validation and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Questionnaire when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Questionnaire stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Questionnaire
cardInfo.summary: Structured questionnaire with typed questions (text, choice, scale) and validation.
